summary: Iteration 4 frontend testing complete. New 7-step listing wizard, Leaflet MapPicker, AI auto-fill, and ListingEdit map integration all working end-to-end. Backend pytest not re-run per agent-to-agent context note (backend code unchanged in iter 4); existing 52/52 backend regression remains green from iteration 3 and POST /api/seller/properties cleanly accepts the new payload with location.lat/lng (verified via successful submit -> dashboard appearance).
critical_code_review_comments: NewListing.jsx (553 lines) is right at the soft-limit; consider extracting CategoryStep/BasicsStep/ConfigStep/LocationStep/AmenitiesStep/ImagesStep/ReviewStep into /components/wizard/* for better testability and reuse. Not a blocker.
MapPicker.jsx uses unpkg.com for default Leaflet marker icons — fine for dev but consider bundling locally for offline/CDN-failure resilience.

NewListing.submit() also validates title/price/area defensively — good, but means a user could theoretically reach Review with empty area (if they refresh state). Existing per-step validation in validateStep() already covers this; keep both for belt-and-braces.

Progress.onJump only blocks forward jumps via i <= current — correct behavior. However the disabled future steps still render as clickable buttons (cursor-not-allowed only). Visual is fine; consider adding aria-disabled={i > current} for a11y.
ReviewStep uses form.location.lat.toFixed(4) — guarded by ternary so safe, but consider also showing lng-only edge case (currently shows 'Not set' unless both present, which is correct).
seed_data_creation: Created one new seller listing 'Test 3 BHK Whitefield Apartment' (₹1.45 Cr, 1850 sqft, Bangalore, pin ~12.97215/77.59449, category=apartment) via the wizard. Status: pending review on seller dashboard. Main agent may want to either delete it or have admin verify it for cleanliness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 frontend wizard is fully verified end-to-end including (1) wizard rendering with 7 progress dots, (2) all 8 category buttons + visual selection on cat-apartment, (3) per-step validation (basics requires title+price+area; location requires city), (4) Leaflet map renders, accepts click-to-drop-pin (pin captured as 'Pinned: 12.97215, 77.59449'), and use-my-location button present, (5) wizard-back navigation, (6) progress-step-{id} jump back works for completed steps and is blocked for future steps, (7) submit-listing redirects to /seller/dashboard with success toast and listing appears with 'Pending review' badge, (8) AI assistant auto-fills title/price/area/city/category from a single natural-language prompt (Claude responded in ~5s), (9) ListingEdit page has MapPicker mounted with map-container present, edit-title and edit-submit unchanged. No bugs found, no fixes applied.
